meta.title: Watch Artemis-1 return from the moon! NASA's Orion is splashing down!!! #artemis1
meta.description:
After 26 days in space, Orion is coming back down to Earth! Artemis 1 // Orion will splash down in the Pacific Ocean, Sunday December 11, off the coast of Baja California at 12:40 p.m. Eastern [17:40 UTC]. 

Orion successfully launched on top of the first launch of the Space Launch System [SLS] rocket on Nov. 16. The reentry and successful recovery of the spacecraft is the biggest and most important test in this mission. 

00:00 - Intro
03:33 - Pre-Landing Preview / Q&A
16:06 - NASA Feed
29:40 - Service Module Separation
49:00 - Initial Re-entry
55:30 - Exit Blackout 1
66:18 - How to steer with offset mass
1:01:30 - Exit Blackout 2
1:05:38 - Drogue Deploy
1:06:42 - Main Chute Deploy
1:09:37 - Splashdown!
1:14:00 - Q&A
2:02:44 - Outro

-------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel and subreddit! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
